1000616203.english: - After talking for a while, I realized that the corners of my mouth were loose and stopped talking.
1000616203.korean: - 한참 이야기하다 입가가 풀어진 것을 깨닫고 말을 멈췄습니다.

1000616204.english: ...There's no way a person like that could suddenly appear in front of me like a miracle.
1000616204.korean: ...갑자기 제 앞에 그런 인간님이 기적처럼 나타날리가 없잖아요.

1000616205.english: - Emily, who had been sitting facing me, tilted her head.
1000616205.korean: - 어느샌가 저를 마주보고 주저앉아있던 에밀리가 고개를 갸웃했습니다.

1000616207.english: - It was wrong of me to do something I shouldn't have done. &n I finally mustered up the courage to reveal my true feelings, but now they're incomprehensible.
1000616207.korean: - 안하던 행동을 한 게 잘못이었어요. &n기껏 용기내서 꺼낸 제 속마음은 잘 모르겠는 것이 되어 버렸습니다.

1000616208.english: Still... a commander is a commander... yeah, a commander is a commander.
1000616208.korean: 그래도... 사령관은 사령관이니까... 응, 사령관은 사령관이야.

1000616209.english: - Emily nodded, reached her own conclusion, and disappeared somewhere.
1000616209.korean: - 혼자서 결론을 내리고 고개를 끄덕인 에밀리는 어디론가 사라졌습니다.

1000616210.english: - It was a conversation with absolutely no context, but it was enough to calm my overflowing emotions.
1000616210.korean: - 맥락이라곤 전혀 없는 대화였지만, 그래도 흘러넘치는 마음을 삭일 정도는 됐습니다.

1000616211.english: - If it were Emily, she wouldn't have told anyone else first.
1000616211.korean: - 에밀리라면 다른 분들한테 먼저 이야기하지도 않을 테니까요.

1000616213.english: - Emily reappeared quickly and held out something.
1000616213.korean: - 금세 다시 나타난 에밀리가 무언가를 내밀었습니다.

1000616215.english: I'm wearing new clothes... The commander said I'm pretty...
1000616215.korean: 나, 새 옷을 입으니까... 사령관이 예쁘다고 해줬어...

1000616217.english: Yeah. The Commander is often with those guys wearing these...
1000616217.korean: 응. 사령관은 이거 입은 애들이랑... 자주 같이 있어...

1000616219.english: - ...That makes sense. The Commander is almost always with the maids.
1000616219.korean: - ...일리가 있는 말입니다. 사령관님은 메이드 분들과 거의 항상 붙어있으니까요.

1000616220.english: - Still... can I really trust you, Commander?
1000616220.korean: - 그래도... 정말 사령관님을 믿어도 되는 걸까요?

1000616221.english: - I was so lost in thought after receiving the maid uniform that I didn't have time to react.
1000616221.korean: - 메이드 복을 받아들고 생각에 잠겨있느라 미처 반응하지 못했습니다.

1000616222.english: - Before I knew it, Emily had taken a step closer and was stroking my head.
1000616222.korean: - 어느새 에밀리는 한 걸음 다가서서 제 머리를 쓰다듬고 있습니다.

1000616224.english: The commander always does this... but Tiamat doesn't like it...?

1000616225.english: - Even though I just got out, the feeling of someone else's hand touching my head lingered strongly.
1000616225.korean: - 바로 벗어났음에도 타인의 손이 제 머리에 닿는 느낌은 강렬하게 남았습니다.

1000616226.english: - It's the first time I've felt this warm feeling since I was born.
1000616226.korean: - 태어나서 처음으로 느껴보는... 마음이 따뜻해지는 감각입니다.

1000616227.english: ...According to the manufacturing order, I'm the older sister. Receiving something like that...
1000616227.korean: ...제조 순서로 따지면 제가 언니입니다. 그런 걸 받는 건...

1000616228.english: Then... Sister, do it for me...

1000616230.english: - Emily grabbed my hand and placed it on her head.
1000616230.korean: - 에밀리는 억지로 제 손을 붙잡아 자기 머리 위에 얹었습니다.

1000616231.english: - My hand, which had been moving inevitably as I was led, was still stroking Emily's long, messy hair even after she let go.
1000616231.korean: - 어쩔 수 없이 이끄는대로 움직이던 제 손은, 에밀리가 손을 떼도 부스스한 긴 머리카락을 쓰다듬고 있었습니다.

1000616233.english: Go ahead. I'll take care of Emily.

1000616234.english: You’re just as uninhibited as ever with people you deem harmless.
1000616234.korean: 무해하다고 판단한 상대에게는 스스럼 없는 모습은 예전 그대로군.

1000616235.english: "The captain of the Cannoniers... was it?" Mr. Royal Arsenal stroked Emily's hair as she fell asleep.
1000616235.korean: - 캐노니어의 대장... 이었던가요. 로열 아스널 씨는 잠들어버린 에밀리의 머리카락을 쓰다듬었습니다.

1000616236.english: - It's a familiar and longing touch, completely different from my clumsy hands.
1000616236.korean: - 제 서툰 손길과는 전혀 다른, 익숙하고도 그리움이 느껴지는 손길입니다.

1000616237.english: Still, it was too much to hurt a human while being careless. I should get in trouble.
1000616237.korean: 그래도 덜렁거리다 인간님께 상처를 입힌 것은 너무 나갔어. 혼나야겠군.

1000616238.english: - Ms. Royal Arsenal looked at me as she held Emily in her arms, who was tossing and turning after being lightly hit on the forehead.
1000616238.korean: - 이마에 살짝 꿀밤을 맞고 몸을 뒤척이는 에밀리를 품에 안으며 로열 아스널 씨는 저를 바라봤습니다.

1000616239.english: Can I not go? The commander should be alone in the top room right now.
1000616239.korean: 안 가봐도 되나? 사령관은 지금 꼭대기 방에 혼자 있을텐데.

1000616242.english: The Commander will be waiting for you to open your heart. Even I, who was just restored, know that much.
1000616242.korean: 사령관은 네가 마음을 열기를 기다리고 있을거다. 그정도는 방금 복원된 나도 알 수 있어.

1000616243.english: And you yourself know it well.
1000616243.korean: 그리고 너 스스로도 잘 알고 있겠지.

1000616244.english: - Mr. Royal Arsenal, who had said that, hugged Emily and turned around without hesitation.
1000616244.korean: - 거기까지 말한 로열 아스널 씨는 에밀리를 안고 미련없이 몸을 돌렸습니다.

1000616245.english: - Before I go see the Commander...

1000616246.english: - I need to go back to the castle and see if there are any AGS left.
1000616246.korean: - 성으로 돌아가서 아직 남아있는 AGS가 있는지 찾아봐야겠어요.

1000616247.english: - The agony in my head disappeared without a trace with just one word from Tiamat.
1000616247.korean: - 머릿속의 고뇌는 티아멧의 한 마디로 온데간데 없이 사라졌다.

1000616248.english: - I returned to the Choco Queen's room with light steps and opened the door.
1000616248.korean: - 가벼운 발걸음으로 초코 여왕의 방으로 돌아와 문을 열었다.

1000616249.english: - Surprisingly, Tiamat is sitting quietly on a chair wearing a maid outfit.
1000616249.korean: - 놀랍게도 티아멧은 메이드복을 입고 의자에 얌전히 앉아있다.

1000616250.english: - Let's go closer. Tiamat is staring intently at the panel.
1000616250.korean: - 다가가보자 티아멧은 패널을 뚫어져라 보고 있다.

1000616251.english: - It's probably too late, but I turned off the panel.

1000616252.english: - What effect will the records of past humans have on Tiamat when she finally opens her heart?
1000616252.korean: - 드디어 마음을 열어주려는 때에 본 과거 인간의 기록이 티아멧에게 무슨 영향을 줄지...

1000616253.english: - I knelt down with a worried heart to get eye level.
1000616253.korean: - 걱정스런 마음으로 무릎을 꿇어 눈높이를 맞췄다.

1000616257.english: As you know... all the people I've met so far have been scary.
1000616257.korean: 아시겠지만... 지금껏 제가 만난 인간님들은 하나같이 무서운 분들이었어요.

1000616258.english: - I remember the fear and distrust in Tiamat's eyes when we first met.
1000616258.korean: - 처음 만났을 때, 티아멧의 공포와 불신이 담긴 눈동자를 기억한다.

1000616259.english: Then I met the commander... and I wanted to trust him.

1000616260.english: But I'm afraid that my trust will be betrayed again... &n I'm sorry. I know you cared so much...
1000616260.korean: 그렇지만 또 믿음을 배신당할까봐 두려워서... &n죄송해요. 신경 많이 써주신 거... 알아요.

1000616261.english: - When I shook my head to indicate that I was okay, Tiamat smiled slightly and then turned her gaze to the panel that had been turned off.
1000616261.korean: - 내가 괜찮다는 뜻으로 고개를 젓자 작게 웃어보인 티아멧의 시선이 전원이 꺼진 패널로 향했다.

1000616262.english: Still... I found out after seeing this.

1000616263.english: It's not just the Commander who's special, it's not like this miracle happened to me...
1000616263.korean: 사령관만 특별한 게 아니구나, 나한테 거짓말같은 기적이 찾아온 게 아니구나... 하고요.

1000616264.english: - Perhaps because my heart was relieved by seeing Tiamat's smile for the first time, I confessed my true feelings that I had been holding in my arms without realizing it.
1000616264.korean: - 처음으로 보는 티아멧의 웃는 모습 때문에 마음이 풀어져서인지, 나도 모르게 혼자 안고 있기로 했던 속마음을 털어놓았다.

1000616265.english: - Tiamat, who had been listening quietly, opened her mouth.
1000616265.korean: - 조용히 듣고 있던 티아멧이 입을 열었다.

1000616266.english: I don't know what would have happened if things had gone the other way, as the Commander said. But...
1000616266.korean: 사령관 말대로 반대였더라면 어떻게 되었을지는 몰라요. 하지만...

1000616267.english: The person next to us now is the commander.
1000616267.korean: 지금 저희 곁에 계시는 분은 사령관이에요.

1000616268.english: I want to... trust a commander like that.

1000616269.english: - Tiamat, who was carefully touching my hand with the bandage on it, gently pulled my hand.
1000616269.korean: - 반창고가 붙어 있는 내 손을 조심스럽게 만지작거리던 티아멧이 살짝 손을 당겼다.

1000616270.english: Please pat me. Did it hurt earlier?

1000616271.english: - Behind Tiamat, beyond the window where sunlight streams in, you can see the soldiers entering the castle in a long line.
1000616271.korean: - 티아멧의 뒤, 햇빛이 새어들어오는 창문 너머 멀리 줄지어 성 안으로 들어오는 대원들의 모습이 보인다.

1000616272.english: - Tiamat, who had been looking at it silently, turned around.
1000616272.korean: - 그것을 말없이 바라보던 티아멧이 빙글 몸을 돌렸다.

1000616273.english: So we're starting in earnest now?

1000616274.english: - It seems like a lot has already happened, but Orca's Valentine's Day is just beginning.
1000616274.korean: - 벌써 많은 일이 있었던 것 같지만 오르카의 발렌타인은 이제 시작이다.

1000616275.english: ...This is my first time doing something like this. Making chocolate, giving it as a gift...
1000616275.korean: ...저, 이런 건 처음이에요. 초콜릿을 만들거나, 선물하거나 하는 날...

1000616276.english: So... can you tell me what the Commander should do?
1000616276.korean: 그러니까... 사령관이 어떻게 해야 하는지 알려주실 수 있나요?

1000616277.english: - "I could change your affiliation to Battle Maid," he joked, and Tiamat made a mocking face.
1000616277.korean: - 배틀메이드로 소속을 바꿔줄수도 있는데? 하고 농담을 던지자 티아멧이 짐짓 토라진 표정을 지었다.

1000616278.english: - I'm more than happy to see such a normal and cute reaction.
1000616278.korean: - 그런 평범하고 귀여운 반응을 보여주는 것이 무엇보다 기쁘다.

1000616280.english: Hehehe, Commander, you don't know anything.

1000616281.english: - What are you talking about? Tiamat is looking at me with a bashful smile.
1000616281.korean: - 무슨 말을 하는걸까? 티아멧은 배시시 웃으며 나를 보고 있다.

1000616282.english: - The commander looks at me in bewilderment.

1000616283.english: - You have no idea what actions of yours saved me.
1000616283.korean: - 자신의 어떤 행동이 제게 구원이 됐는지 전혀 모르시나봐요.

1000616284.english: - Really... You're so oblivious to strange things.

1000616285.english: The Commander really... really... uh, why...?

1000616286.english: - You must be happy, the happiest you've ever been, but tears are streaming down your cheeks.
1000616286.korean: - 분명히 기쁠텐데, 태어나서 가장 기쁠텐데도 눈물이 볼을 타고 흘러내립니다.

1000616287.english: - I tried to wipe them away, but the tears didn't stop and continued to flow as if a dam had broken.
1000616287.korean: - 닦아내려 해봤지만 눈물은 그치긴 커녕 둑이 무너진 것처럼 계속해서 흐릅니다.

1000616288.english: - The commander stood there blankly, crying, and silently held me in his arms.
1000616288.korean: - 사령관은 멍하니 서서 울고 있는 저를 말없이 품에 안아주셨습니다.

1000616290.english: - I cried and poured out my heart, the feelings I had kept buried deep in my heart.
1000616290.korean: - 계속 가슴 깊은 곳에 묻어뒀던 속마음을 울음과 함께 털어놓았습니다.

1000616291.english: I'm so glad the Commander is the last human...

1000616293.english: - After a small commotion, Emily disappeared, saying something incomprehensible about giving her a butterfly.
1000616293.korean: - 작은 소동 이후 에밀리는 나비를 주겠다는 알 수 없는 말을 하며 사라졌다.

1000616294.english: - Fanny, Raven, and Aurora went to clean up the mess in the kitchen... and in Aurora's words, it was a horrific accident scene.
1000616294.korean: - 파니와 레이븐, 아우로라는 엉망이 된 주방을 정리하러 갔고... 아우로라의 말을 빌리면 참혹한 사고 현장이라고 한다.

1000616295.english: - I returned to the Choco Queen's room and sat down on the desk chair.
1000616295.korean: - 초코 여왕의 방으로 돌아와 책상 의자에 앉았다.

1000616296.english: - I turn on the panel without thinking and the journal I checked earlier comes into view.
1000616296.korean: - 별 생각 없이 패널을 켜자 아까 확인했던 일지가 눈에 들어온다.

1000616297.english: - Suddenly, I become curious about this Choco Queen, a human before her destruction.
1000616297.korean: - 문득 이 초코 여왕이라는 멸망 전의 인간에 대해 궁금해진다.

1000616298.english: - It is clear that she was not an ordinary person.

1000616299.english: - Seeing how she grew a simple confectionery company to such a large scale, and how she herself lived in a huge castle with a dessert factory attached...
1000616299.korean: - 단순한 과자 회사를 그렇게까지 크게 성장시키고, 자신은 디저트 공장이 딸린 거대한 성에서 사는 것을 보면...

1000616300.english: - Plus, the AGS are too powerful for a single company's security force.
1000616300.korean: - 거기다 일개 회사의 경비병력 치고는 지나치게 강력한 AGS들까지.

1000616301.english: - There was a passage in Aurora's records that said it was designed using Black River's technology.
1000616301.korean: - 아우로라의 기록에는 블랙리버의 기술을 빼돌려 설계했다는 구절이 있었다.

1000616302.english: - Since they were supplied with such Bioroids, they might have had connections there.
1000616302.korean: - 그런 바이오로이드를 공급 받았을 정도니, 그쪽에 연줄이 닿아있었는지도 모르지.

1000616303.english: - I opened the Choco Queen's diary while thinking about this and that.
1000616303.korean: - 이런저런 생각을 하며 초코 여왕의 일지를 열었다.

1000616304.english: - Personality is reflected in writing. A diary written with the intention of being kept private reveals the writer's inner self.
1000616304.korean: - 글에는 인격이 묻어난다. 거기에 남에게 보이지 않을 생각으로 쓴 일기라면 쓴 사람의 내면을 그대로 드러낸다.

1000616305.english: - The Choco Queen who appeared in the diary... wasn't a villain.
1000616305.korean: - 일지에서 모습을 드러낸 초코 여왕은... 악인이 아니었다.

1000616306.english: - Pure creative passion bordering on madness.

1000616307.english: - In every part of the diary, the desire to make others happy through creative passion is evident.
1000616307.korean: - 일지의 모든 부분에서 그 창작열을 통해 다른 이들을 행복하게 해주고 싶다는 열망이 드러나 있다.

1000616308.english: - Even androids were no exception for her.

1000616309.english: - Even by reading the journal a little, you can tell that the Choco Queen cherished the bioroids.
1000616309.korean: - 일지를 조금만 읽어봐도 초코 여왕은 바이오로이드를 아꼈다는 것을 알 수 있다.

1000616310.english: - But... that method is twisted to an extent that it cannot be helped.
1000616310.korean: - 하지만... 그 방식은 어찌할 수 없을 정도로 뒤틀려있다.

1000616311.english: - As expected, the Choco Queen was the daughter of a wealthy man.

1000616312.english: She, who was born after the creation of the Bioroid, was raised constantly attended by top-class bio-androids.
1000616312.korean: - 바이오로이드가 탄생한 이후에 태어난 그녀는 줄곧 최고급 바이오로이드의 시중을 받으며 자랐다.

1000616313.english: - And as a result... Choco Queen grew up with proper humanity, but her attitude toward Bioroids became distorted due to external factors.
1000616313.korean: - 그리고 결과적으로... 초코 여왕은 올바른 인간성을 지니고 성장했지만 외부적인 요인에 의해 바이오로이드를 대하는 태도가 일그러지고 말았다.

1000616314.english: - The word 'inventory' that I saw earlier comes to mind.

1000616315.english: - In my opinion, it's like cherishing a useful tool or treating it like a pet.
1000616315.korean: - 내가 보기엔 쓸만한 도구를 소중히 여기거나, 애완동물을 귀여워하는 정도의 취급.

1000616316.english: - But that was the true heart of the Choco Queen, and the Bioroids also followed the Choco Queen with all their heart.
1000616316.korean: - 하지만 그것이 초코 여왕의 진심이었고, 바이오로이드들도 그런 초코 여왕을 진심으로 따랐다.

1000616317.english: - The Choco Queen wrote that although she had the halo of her family, the biggest reason for her success was the dedicated support of the Bioroids.
1000616317.korean: - 가문의 후광도 있었지만 자신이 성공한 가장 큰 이유는 바이오로이드들의 헌신적인 지원이었다... 라고 초코 여왕은 적었다.

1000616318.english: - He got up from his heavy chair.

1000616319.english: - I just can't understand the psychology of the Choco Queen.
1000616319.korean: - 나로서는 초코 여왕의 심리를 도저히 이해할 수 없다.

1000616320.english: - I can't understand, nor do I want to understand, Queen Choco, who cherishes Bioroids but treats them as tools.
1000616320.korean: - 바이오로이드를 아끼면서도 그들을 도구로써 다룬 초코 여왕을 이해할 수도, 이해하고 싶지도 않다.

1000616321.english: - But on the other hand... what if the Chocolate Queen saw me?
1000616321.korean: - 하지만 반대로... 초코 여왕이 나를 본다면 어떨까?

1000616322.english: - She probably doesn't understand me either. It's wrong to treat a Bioroid like I do... I think I heard that.
1000616322.korean: - 그녀도 아마 나를 이해하지 못하겠지. 바이오로이드를 나처럼 대하는 것은 잘못된 것이다... 라는 말이 들린 것 같다.

1000616323.english: - And also... if the Chocolate Queen were in my place right now.
1000616323.korean: - 그리고 또... 만약 초코 여왕이 지금 내 자리에 있었다면.

1000616324.english: - What if it wasn't me who opened my eyes as the last human, but the Choco Queen?
1000616324.korean: - 최후의 인간으로서 눈을 뜬 게 내가 아니라 초코 여왕이었다면 어떻게 됐을까.

1000616325.english: - My heart ached when I thought about it that far.

1000616326.english: - Probably... not that different from me now. The only difference between her and me is our surroundings.
1000616326.korean: - 아마... 지금의 나와 그리 다르지 않았겠지. 그녀와 내가 다른 점은 주변 환경 뿐이니까.

1000616327.english: - A question I've never thought about before raises its head.
1000616327.korean: - 한 번도 생각해보지 않았던 의문이 고개를 든다.

1000616328.english: - Do the Bioroids like me, or do they like the last human?
1000616328.korean: - 바이오로이드들은 나를 좋아해주는 걸까, 아니면 최후의 인간님을 좋아해주는 걸까.

1000616329.english: - To calm my complicated mind, I went down the stairs and headed to the castle corridor.
1000616329.korean: - 복잡한 마음을 달래려 계단을 내려가 성의 회랑으로 향했다.

1000616330.english: - While walking, looking at the courtyard scenery that looked different from before, I received a call from an unexpected person.
1000616330.korean: - 아까와는 달라보이는 안뜰의 풍경을 보며 걷던 중 뜻밖의 인물에게서 호출이 들어왔다.

1000616334.english: - Tiamat asking me to command a battle... That's never happened before.
1000616334.korean: - 티아멧이 전투 지휘를 부탁하다니... 지금까진 한 번도 없었던 일이다.

1000616338.english: - Tiamat's determination was felt in the title that seemed to have not changed.
1000616338.korean: - 바뀌지 않은듯 바뀐 호칭에서 티아멧의 결심이 느껴졌다.

1000616339.english: And... can you give me some candy? Even the ones I didn't get last time.
1000616339.korean: 그리고... 사탕을 주실 수 있나요? 저번에 못 받았던 것까지요.

1000616341.english: - After the eventful Valentine's Day, I returned to work.
1000616341.korean: - 다사다난했던 발렌타인이 끝나고, 나는 일과로 돌아왔다.

1000616342.english: - While doing my usual work and distributing tasks to the commanders and directing the battle...
1000616342.korean: - 평소처럼 업무를 처리하고, 지휘관들과 배분해서 전투를 지휘하는 중에...

1000616344.english: - I decided to take some time to consult with the new members who joined Orca.
1000616344.korean: - 짬을 내어 오르카에 새로 합류한 대원들과 상담을 진행하기로 했다.

1000616345.english: But what do you do for counseling?

1000616346.english: - I remembered the story I'd heard in the letter. My body had strangely become hot.
1000616346.korean: - 편지로 전해들었던 이야기가 떠올랐다. 몸이 이상하게 뜨거워졌다던가.

1000616347.english: - When asked about it, Fenrir became a little sullen.
1000616347.korean: - 그것에 대해 묻자 펜리르는 조금 시무룩해졌다.

1000616348.english: Yeah... I'm always hungry these days, and it's hot...
1000616348.korean: 응... 요즘 자꾸 배가 고프구, 덥구...

1000616349.english: It was like that until a little while ago, but it seems a little better now that I see you, Master!
1000616349.korean: 조금 전까지도 그랬는데, 주인님 보니까 조금 괜찮아졌어!

1000616350.english: - Master~ I asked while stroking Fenrir who was hugging me.
1000616350.korean: - 주인님~ 하고 안기는 펜리르를 쓰다듬으며 물었다.

1000616351.english: Yeah, yeah. I did, but he said there was no problem. He laughed strangely and said it was completely normal.
1000616351.korean: 응응. 그랬는데 별 문제 없대. 이상하게 웃으면서 오히려 아주 정상이라고 했어.

1000616352.english: - Then, there is a high probability that there is no actual problem with your body.
1000616352.korean: - 그렇다면 실제로 몸에 별 문제는 없을 확률이 높다.

1000616353.english: If there's no physical problem, the only thing left is the mental aspect. That's something I can help you with.
1000616353.korean: - 신체에 문제가 없다면 남은 건 정신적인 부분. 내가 해결해줄 수 있는 분야다.

1000616354.english: - At my words, Fenrir, who had been sniffing with her nose buried in my chest, suddenly sat up.
1000616354.korean: - 내 말에 가슴팍에 코를 묻고 킁킁거리며 냄새를 맡던 펜리르가 벌떡 몸을 일으켰다.

1000616355.english: Yes! I'll let you eat as much as you want, Master!

1000616358.english: - Fenrir was originally a Bioroid that guarded a secret facility, but before joining Orca, she wandered around the wild, and her wolf genes must have awakened.
1000616358.korean: - 펜리르는 원래 비밀 시설같은 곳의 경비를 맡던 바이오로이드였지만, 오르카에 합류하기 전까지 야생을 떠돌다보니 늑대 유전자의 본성이 깨어나버렸을 것이다.

1000616359.english: - It must have been quite frustrating to just stay in the sea.

1000616360.english: Wow! As expected, the master is the best!

1000616361.english: - I felt a little sorry seeing Fenrir jumping for joy. I should have been more careful sooner...
1000616361.korean: - 뛸듯이 기뻐하는 펜리르를 보며 조금 미안해졌다. 진작 신경써줬어야 했는데...

1000616362.english: Master, hurry! I'm hungry again. Huh?
1000616362.korean: 주인님, 얼른! 나 또 배고파. 응?

1000616364.english: - Fenrir, who came out, looked very happy.
1000616364.korean: - 밖으로 나온 펜리르는 무척 기분이 좋아보였다.

1000616365.english: - And yet, it's admirable how she doesn't forget her original mission and sticks close to me, keeping an eye on her surroundings.
1000616365.korean: - 그러면서도 본연의 임무를 잊지 않고 내 옆에 찰싹 붙어 주변을 경계하는 모습이 기특하다.

1000616366.english: Yeah! The master is worried because Fenrir is here... Huh?!
1000616366.korean: 응! 펜리르가 있으니까 주인님은 걱정... 으햣?!

1000616367.english: - As I stroked her hair and ears as usual, Fenrir's body jumped up.
1000616367.korean: - 평소처럼 머리카락과 귀를 쓰다듬어 주자 펜리르의 몸이 튀어올랐다.

1000616368.english: - Fenrir tilted her head as if she was surprised, and her nose twitched.
1000616368.korean: - 본인도 놀란듯 고개를 갸웃하던 펜리르의 코가 씰룩거렸다.

1000616371.english: - Fenrir literally disappeared into the forest at lightning speed.
1000616371.korean: - 펜리르는 말 그대로 쏜살같이 숲 속으로 사라졌다.

1000616372.english: - Just as I was about to contact the long-range security team, I heard the screams of an animal coming from deep within the forest.
1000616372.korean: - 원거리 경호팀에게 연락하려는 순간, 숲 안쪽에서 꾸이익 하는 동물의 비명소리가 들렸다.

1000616373.english: - And with the sound of footsteps going "dudadada", Fenrir returned.
1000616373.korean: - 그리고 두다다다하는 발소리와 함께 펜리르가 돌아왔다.

1000616376.english: - What Fenrir brought was a house-sized boar, its throat neatly slashed.
1000616376.korean: - 펜리르가 끌고 온 것은 깔끔하게 멱이 따인, 집채만한 멧돼지였다.

1000616377.english: I'm good at hunting, right? Since the Iron Bugs don't bother animals, I was able to eat a lot of meat.
1000616377.korean: 나, 사냥 잘하지? 철충들은 동물은 건드리지 않으니까 고기 많이 먹을 수 있었어.

1000616378.english: Just wait a moment, Master. I'll let you eat soon.
1000616378.korean: 조금만 기다려, 주인님. 금방 먹게 해줄게.

1000616379.english: - No matter what, wouldn't it be a bit strange to eat it raw?
1000616379.korean: - 아무리 그래도 날 것으로 먹기는 조금 그렇지 않을까?

1000616380.english: - In response to my question, Fenrir's expression became strange as she skillfully peeled off the skin of a wild boar with the dual blade she was carrying.
1000616380.korean: - 내 물음에 들고다니는 듀얼블레이드로 멧돼지의 가죽을 능숙하게 슥슥 벗겨내고있던 펜리르의 표정이 묘해졌다.

1000616381.english: So that's what Master was thinking of me...?

1000616382.english: - I couldn't deny it right away. No, I feel like Fenrir would usually think that way…
1000616382.korean: - 바로 부정할 수가 없었다. 아니, 펜리르는 보통 그럴거라고 생각할 것 같은데...

1000616383.english: I just have wolf genes; I'm not like a wild animal.
1000616383.korean: 나는 늑대 유전자가 포함됐을 뿐이지 야생동물 같은 게 아니란말이야.

1000616384.english: It won't cause you an upset stomach if you just eat it, but it won't taste good.
1000616384.korean: 그냥 먹는다고 탈나는 건 아니지만 그럼 맛이 없어.

1000616385.english: - Fenrir inflated the ball and took something out from her chest.
1000616385.korean: - 펜리르는 볼을 부풀리며 품속에서 무언가를 꺼냈다.

1000616386.english: - Whether she was firmly sulking or not, Fenrir didn't respond and instead gathered fallen leaves and branches from around her.
1000616386.korean: - 단단히 삐졌는지 펜리르는 대답도 하지않고 주변에서 낙엽과 나뭇가지를 모아왔다.

1000616387.english: - There was a sound of something being scratched, and soon the dry leaves caught fire.
1000616387.korean: - 무언가를 긁는 소리가 나고, 이내 마른 낙엽에 불이 붙었다.

1000616388.english: - Fenrir, who had been rummaging through the branches for a while to keep the embers alive, pursed her lips and looked up at me.
1000616388.korean: - 한동안 불씨를 키우기 위해 나뭇가지를 뒤적이던 펜리르가 입술을 내밀고 나를 올려다봤다.

1000616389.english: - At times like this, there's no choice but to use a finishing move.

1000616391.english: - When I gently scratched under her chin, Fenrir's gaze became dazed.
1000616391.korean: - 턱 밑을 살살 긁어주자 펜리르의 눈빛이 멍해졌다.

1000616392.english: - Since Hachiko liked it before, I thought I’d try it on Fenrir just in case, and as expected, it was very effective.
1000616392.korean: - 예전에 하치코가 좋아하길래 혹시나 싶어 펜리르한테도 해봤더니 역시나 효과 만점이었다.

1000616395.english: - Fenrir, who had been absentmindedly licking my palm, suddenly woke up as if she had finally come to her senses.
1000616395.korean: - 멍하게 내 손바닥을 핥던 펜리르가 이제야 정신이 든 것처럼 화들짝 몸을 일으켰다.

1000616397.english: The master doesn't eat it. He has to protect it.

1000616398.english: Oh, that's right, meat! Master, just wait a minute!
1000616398.korean: 아, 맞다 고기! 주인님, 잠깐만 기다려!

1000616400.english: - Fenrir is sitting between my legs as I collapse on the floor.
1000616400.korean: - 펜리르는 바닥에 주저앉은 내 다리 사이에 앉아있다.

1000616402.english: - Fenrir cut down the branches of the surrounding trees and quickly made a makeshift grill and began to grill the meat.
1000616402.korean: - 펜리르는 주위 나뭇가지를 잘라 순식간에 간이 석쇠를 만들곤 고기를 굽기 시작했다.

1000616403.english: - Then she took out a small pouch from her bosom and added salt, pepper, and other spices to the meat.
1000616403.korean: - 그리고 품 속에서 작은 주머니를 꺼내더니 소금, 후추 등 각종 향신료를 고기에 곁들였다.

1000616404.english: Yeah, yeah. I haven't had it with me lately, but I brought it out so you can eat some delicious meat.
1000616404.korean: 응응. 요새는 안 가지고 다녔었는데, 주인님 맛있는 고기 먹게 해주려고 꺼내왔어.

1000616405.english: I stroked Fenrir's head as she sat with her back turned. But her reaction was a bit...
1000616405.korean: - 등을 돌리고 앉아있는 펜리르의 머리를 쓰다듬었다. 그런데 반응이 조금...

1000616406.english: - If it were normal, I would have laughed and hugged her, but Fenrir just shrugged her shoulders at my touch.
1000616406.korean: - 평소같았으면 헤헤 웃으면서 안겨들 타이밍이었지만, 펜리르는 내 손길에 따라 어깨를 움찔거릴 뿐이었다.

1000616408.english: I'm weird... I'm full... but I'm hungry...
1000616408.korean: 나 이상해... 배가 부른데... 배가 고파...

1000616409.english: Aren't you hungry...? Ugh, I don't know...

1000616410.english: - Fenrir is a Bioroid, so it's hard to say she got sick from eating something wrong...
1000616410.korean: - 잘못 먹어서 탈이 났다기엔 펜리르는 바이오로이드인데...

1000616411.english: - I tried to get up, but my hand was grabbed and I fell to the ground.
1000616411.korean: - 몸을 일으키려다 손을 붙잡혀 땅에 쓰러지고 말았다.

1000616413.english: - Blushing cheeks and heated breath. It's a familiar sight.
1000616413.korean: - 발갛게 달아오른 볼과 열오른 숨결. 익숙한 모습이다.

1000616414.english: Master... Master... Ugh, I feel weird...

1000616416.english: - And perhaps the reason Fenrir acts like this is because her wolf instincts have become stronger due to her long life in the wild?
1000616416.korean: - 그리고 펜리르가 이러는 것은 아마, 오랜 야생 생활로 인해 늑대의 본능이 강해져서가 아닐까?

1000616417.english: - It's just a guess, but I can't think of any other reason at the moment.
1000616417.korean: - 추측일 뿐이지만 현재로선 그것 외엔 다른 이유가 생각나지 않는다.

1000616418.english: - It seems like there's no one around, but the long-range security team must be watching this right now.
1000616418.korean: - 주위엔 아무도 없는 것 같지만, 원거리 경호팀이 지금 이 모습을 보고 있을 것이 분명하다.

1000616420.english: - We've come quite far from Orca, so this place is closer to the Choco Queen's castle.
1000616420.korean: - 오르카에서 꽤 멀리까지 나왔으니 이곳이라면 초코 여왕의 성이 더 가깝다.

1000616421.english: - Fenrir nodded silently and began to follow me with staggering steps.
1000616421.korean: - 말없이 고개를 끄덕인 펜리르는 비척거리는 발걸음으로 나를 따라오기 시작했다.

1000616422.english: What the...? Why is there a milk jug like this...

1000616423.english: Oh, it's Elven Milk?! There's so much of it...
1000616423.korean: 에, 엘븐 밀크잖아?! 이렇게나 많이 있다니...

1000616424.english: What, are you trying to steal it?

1000616425.english: Ah?! Oh, no, that's not it…

1000616426.english: It's not finished yet, so even if you take it now, it won't taste good.
1000616426.korean: 아직 완성 안됐으니까 지금 가져가봤자 맛없을걸?

1000616430.english: Isn't that the famous snack production complex? I guess they used to raise dairy cows nearby.
1000616430.korean: 저기가 그 유명한 과자 생산 단지잖아? 예전에 근처에서 젖소를 키웠었나봐.

1000616431.english: There were still some guys surviving and wandering around here, so the two of us quickly caught them and gathered them up.
1000616431.korean: 아직까지 살아남아서 요 주변을 돌아다니는 녀석들이 있길래, 둘이서 냉큼 잡아다 좀 모아뒀지.

1000616433.english: Elven! I told you it's uncomfortable to walk with this on...!

1000616434.english: I told you to go slowly!

1000616435.english: You shouldn't have dressed like me. This is formal attire, right?
1000616435.korean: 그러게 나처럼 안 입었으면 됐잖아. 이게 정식 복장이라니깐?

1000616436.english: Doesn't it feel liberating and nice?

1000616439.english: You put it on right away because you thought the Commander would like it, and then you took it off like that?
1000616439.korean: 사령관님이 좋아하실거라니까 냉큼 입어놓고선 그렇게 빼기야?

1000616440.english: Hey, Commander, do you like this kind of thing...?

1000616441.english: Not only the Commander, but all the old male humans also liked it.
1000616441.korean: 사령관님 뿐만 아니라 예전 남자 인간님들도 다 좋아했다구.

1000616442.english: I heard you had a fan club too?

1000616443.english: Oh, right! There was a record like that.

1000616444.english: The secret to Elven Milk's flavor lies in a single Bioroid, which was even used for promotional events...
1000616444.korean: 엘븐밀크의 맛의 비밀은 한 바이오로이드에게 담겨있고, 그 바이오로이드는 판촉 행사에 동원되기도 했다고...

1000616446.english: I've never been there since I was restored, but there's an Elven Milk factory there, right?
1000616446.korean: 나는 복원되서 한 번도 해본 적 없었는데 저기에 엘븐밀크 공장이 있잖아?

1000616447.english: I checked and the production line seems to be still running, so I'm making some to distribute to the commander and the other kids.
1000616447.korean: 확인해보니까 마침 생산라인도 살아있겠다, 만들어서 사령관님이랑 다른 애들한테 나눠주려고.

1000616448.english: What was in the Orca kitchen refrigerator? There was quite a lot...
1000616448.korean: 오르카 주방 냉장고에 있던건? 꽤 많이 있던데...

1000616449.english: That's not 'my' Elven Milk. It's the Elven Milk from the old Elven Forest Maker.
1000616449.korean: 그건 '내' 엘븐밀크가 아니잖아. 예전 엘븐 포레스트메이커의 엘븐밀크지.

1000616450.english: And if possible, I'd like to feed our commander fresh food instead of preserved food. Right, Dark Elven?
1000616450.korean: 그리고 이왕이면 우리 사령관님한텐 보존된 거 말고 신선한 걸로 먹여주고 싶어서. 그치, 다크엘븐?

1000616452.english: Hey, if it's okay, can I do it too? If you're going to give it to the Commander...
1000616452.korean: 저기, 혹시 괜찮으면 나도 해도 돼? 사령관한테 줄 거면...

1000616453.english: What the heck, how long has it been since you came here and you're already crazy about our commander?
1000616453.korean: 뭐야, 온 지 얼마나 됐다고 벌써 우리 사령관님한테 푹 빠진거야?

1000616454.english: Oh, no... I'm not completely into it... That's...
1000616454.korean: 아, 아니이... 푹 빠진 건 아니고... 그게...

1000616458.english: There's nothing to hide. I'm sure all Orca Bioroids feel the same way anyway.
1000616458.korean: 숨길 거 없어. 어차피 오르카 바이오로이드들은 다 같은 마음일걸?

1000616459.english: Where... well, if you give extra points for being a chef, I think I'll pass just barely.
1000616459.korean: 어디... 음, 요리사니까 가산점을 주면 아슬아슬하게 합격이려나.

1000616460.english: Let's go. We might be able to create some really sweet Elven Milk.
1000616460.korean: 가자. 아주 달콤한 엘븐밀크가 탄생할 수도 있겠어.

1000616462.english: Okay, wait a minute. Something sweet...?

1000616464.english: You're going to do it too, so what? Don't worry, I'll teach you how.
1000616464.korean: 너도 할 건데 뭐 어때~ 내가 잘 알려줄 테니까 걱정 마.

1000616465.english: Ahaha... I'm going to go now.

1000616466.english: Elven Milk, I'm sure you're looking forward to it...

1000616468.english: Where are you running away to!

1000616470.english: You were short-sighted to try to run away from me, a chef who was wandering around the forest!
1000616470.korean: 요리사 주제에 숲을 누비던 나한테서 도망가려하다니, 생각이 짧았네!

1000616471.english: Oh, please! I don't want to do this anymore!

1000616472.english: Hey, don't yell! There are still Metal Parasites around...
1000616472.korean: 야, 소리 지르지 마! 주변에 아직 철충이...

1000616473.english: Oh, look. There's a signal. Dark Elven, it's time to relieve stress!
1000616473.korean: 아, 거 봐. 신호 잡히잖아. 다크엘븐, 스트레스 풀 시간이야!

1000616476.english: How is it? Feeling a little less stressed?

1000616478.english: That stress is ultimately your fault...

1000616479.english: In the end, she put it on with her own hands and keeps doing it.
1000616479.korean: 결국 자기 손으로 입어놓고 자꾸 그러네.

1000616482.english: Let's go. After making elven milk, we'll hold a tasting event at that castle.
1000616482.korean: 가자. 엘븐밀크를 만들고나서 저기 성에서 시식회를 열 거야.

1000616483.english: Ah, right. Aurora will be a big help when moving the finished product.
1000616483.korean: 아, 그래. 완성품을 옮길때 아우로라가 큰 도움이 되겠어.

1000616484.english: Is this the last one? Good, perfect.

1000616485.english: Now let's call the other kids and the commander.

1000616486.english: I never want to do it again...

1000616487.english: Would you change your mind if you saw the Commander eating deliciously?
1000616487.korean: 사령관님이 맛있게 먹는 걸 보면 생각이 바뀔걸?

1000616488.english: Oh, right. I'm sure the chef would understand that feeling better.
1000616488.korean: 아, 그래. 요리사님이 그런 뿌듯함은 더 잘 알겠지.

1000616489.english: Oh... I'm not sugar... The chef and everyone else...
1000616489.korean: 흑... 나는 설탕이 아니란 말야... 주방장님도 그렇고 다들...

1000616490.english: Bioroid is made of sugar, spice, and origin dust. It's Elven Milk's manufacturing philosophy.
1000616490.korean: 바이오로이드는 설탕과 향신료와 오리진 더스트로 이루어져 있다잖아. &n엘븐밀크의 제조 이념이야.

1000616492.english: - As I entered the Choco Queen's castle and passed through the courtyard, I heard a familiar voice and looked to see that it was Aurora looking for me.
1000616492.korean: - 초코 여왕의 성으로 들어와 안뜰을 지날때 익숙한 목소리가 들려 와봤더니 아우로라가 나를 찾고 있었다.

1000616494.english: - A sweet scent wafts over me as Aurora, tears welling up in her eyes, hugs me.
1000616494.korean: - 눈에 눈물이 그렁그렁한 아우로라가 안겨들자 달콤한 향기가 훅 끼쳐온다.

1000616495.english: Hey, you! Why are you here?!

1000616496.english: That's good timing. Commander, I have some freshly made elven milk. Would you like a glass?
1000616496.korean: 마침 잘됐네. 사령관님, 방금 만든 신선한 엘븐밀크가 있는데 한 잔 하실래요?

1000616497.english: Dark Elven, give me yours too.

1000616498.english: Ah, I'm not mentally ready yet...!
1000616498.korean: 아, 아직 마음의 준비가 안 됐단 말야...!

1000616499.english: Really? Then I should start with mine... No, I should start with the guest members.
1000616499.korean: 그래? 그럼 내 거 부터... 아니다, 객원 멤버부터 챙겨줘야지.

1000616500.english: Here, Commander. This is Aurora's special elven milk.
1000616500.korean: 여기요, 사령관님. 아우로라가 만든 스페셜 엘븐밀크에요.

1000616501.english: - Aurora, who was sobbing in my arms, flinched and slowly fell when her name was mentioned.y
1000616501.korean: - 품에 안겨서 울먹이던 아우로라는 자기 이름이 나오자 움찔 몸을 떨고는 천천히 떨어졌다.

1000616503.english: - Did the pastry chef make milk too? Well, since Aurora made it, it must be delicious.
1000616503.korean: - 파티시에르가 우유도 만들던가? 뭐, 아우로라가 만들었으니 맛있겠지.

1000616504.english: - When I take a sip of milk, a sweet taste spreads throughout my mouth.
1000616504.korean: - 우유를 한 모금 마시자 입 속에 달콤한 맛이 확 퍼진다.

1000616506.english: - Yet, it's not overpowering. A sweet fragrance that spreads gently without harming the natural taste of fresh milk.
1000616506.korean: - 그러면서도 과하지 않다. 신선한 우유 본연의 맛을 해치지 않으면서도 은은히 퍼지는 달콤한 향.

1000616507.english: - Yes. It's like the sweet scent emanating from Aurora...
1000616507.korean: - 그래. 마치 아우로라한테서 풍기는 달콤한 향기같은...

1000616509.english: That's fortunate, because that's all Aurora could make.

1000616510.english: Is it because I'm awkward at first... or because it's a bit small?
1000616510.korean: 처음이라 서툴러서 그런지... 아니면 좀 작아서?

1000616512.english: - The shocking words made Elven Milk spit out a spurt of anger.
1000616512.korean: - 충격적인 말에 사례가 들려 엘븐밀크를 뿜어내고 말았다.

1000616514.english: All right, you. Try mine too.

1000616515.english: - The Dark Elven, who had been silently observing the situation, turned her head and handed over the milk.
1000616515.korean: - 말없이 상황을 지켜보고 있던 다크엘븐이 고개를 돌린채 우유를 내밀었다.

1000616517.english: Hey, where are you looking! That's not it!

1000616518.english: - When I received the Dark Elven's chocolate-flavored Elven Milk, I heard footsteps behind me.
1000616518.korean: - 다크엘븐의 그... 초코맛 엘븐밀크를 받아들었을때, 뒤에서 발소리가 들렸다.

1000616520.english: - It was only after hearing the voice that I realized belatedly that Fenrir was not there.
1000616520.korean: - 목소리를 듣고서야 뒤늦게 펜리르가 자리에 없다는 사실을 깨달았다.

1000616521.english: - Let's quickly look back and there...

1000616525.english: - As soon as I realized that Fenrir had disappeared, I was thrown to the ground by someone.
1000616525.korean: - 펜리르의 모습이 사라졌다고 자각함과 동시에, 나는 누군가에게 덮쳐져 바닥에 쓰러졌다.

1000616526.english: - It's obvious who that someone is.

1000616528.english: Hey you! Resist with some serious resolve!

1000616529.english: Ah... I'm sorry, Commander. I just lost my mind for a moment...
1000616529.korean: 아으... 미안해, 사령관. 나 잠깐 정신을...

1000616532.english: - I hope you understand that I cannot describe the events that followed in detail.
1000616532.korean: - 이후의 일을 자세히 묘사하지 못하는 점, 이해해주길 바란다.

1000616533.english: - If I may just deduce what I can say, first of all, I couldn't walk back to Orca on my own two feet.
1000616533.korean: - 말할 수 있는 것만 추리자면, 우선 나는 두 발로 걸어서 오르카로 돌아가지 못했다는 것.

1000616534.english: - And Fenrir was dragged to Perrault and forced to cool down.
1000616534.korean: - 그리고 펜리르는 페로에게 끌려가서 강제로 몸을 식혔다는 것.

1000616535.english: - Lastly, I took a day off due to poor condition and had Daphne treat my abrasion.
1000616535.korean: - 마지막으로 나는 컨디션 불량으로 하루 휴가를 내고 다프네에게 찰과상을 치료받았다는 것 정도.

1000616537.english: - Every human being must take responsibility for his or her actions.
1000616537.korean: - 인간이라면 누구나 자신의 행동에 책임을 져야한다.

1000616538.english: - As a commander leading numerous troops, this responsibility is even more important to me.
1000616538.korean: - 수많은 대원들을 이끄는 사령관인 나에겐, 그런 책임이 더욱 막중하다.

1000616539.english: - And I... am taking full responsibility for the words I rashly uttered.
1000616539.korean: - 그리고 난... 섣불리 입 밖으로 낸 말에 대해 통렬하게 책임을 지는 중이다.

1000616540.english: - Ugh, I have to hold back...!

1000616541.english: - If you prick me with a needle right now, wouldn't chocolate probably flow out instead of blood?
1000616541.korean: - 지금 내 몸을 바늘로 찌르면 아마 피 대신 초콜릿이 흘러나오지 않을까?

1000616542.english: - I'm so immersed in chocolate that I'm thinking about that.
1000616542.korean: - 그런 생각이 들 정도로... 나는 초콜릿에 파묻혀 지내고 있다.

1000616543.english: - The reason for securing the territory of the Choco Queen was because Orca's equipment could not produce chocolate for all of the members.
1000616543.korean: - 초코 여왕의 영지를 확보한 이유는 오르카의 설비로는 대원들 전원이 초콜릿을 만들지 못하기 때문이었다.

1000616544.english: - Although there were a few incidents, the team successfully secured and repaired the performance equipment and began preparing chocolate for me.
1000616544.korean: - 몇가지 사건이 있긴 했지만 대원들은 성공적으로 성과 설비를 확보, 수리해 나를 위한 초콜릿을 준비하기 시작했다.

1000616545.english: - The Choco Queen's castle and its various confectionery factories could accommodate a large number of members.
1000616545.korean: - 초코 여왕의 성과 거기에 딸린 각종 과자 공장은 수많은 대원들을 수용할 수 있었다.

1000616546.english: The facilities at the headquarters of a past global confectionery company more than made up for the somewhat clumsy skills of its employees. And...
1000616546.korean: - 과거에 전세계에 퍼져나갔던 과자회사의 본사의 설비는 대원들의 다소 서투른 솜씨를 충분히 메꿔주었다. 그리고...

1000616547.english: - The result is... a pile of chocolates that could fill the room of the Choco Queen.
1000616547.korean: - 그 결과는 이... 초코 여왕의 방을 가득 채울 정도로 쌓인 초콜릿들이다.

1000616548.english: - Even at this very moment, the chocolates made by the team members are probably heading here, just like on a factory production line...
1000616548.korean: - 지금 이시간에도 마치 공장의 생산 라인처럼 대원들이 만들어낸 초콜릿이 여기로 향하고 있겠지...

1000616549.english: - From simply re-hardened and decorated chocolate, to chocolate cake, chocolate mousse, chocolate ice cream, chocolate cookies...
1000616549.korean: - 단순히 다시 굳혀 장식한 초콜릿부터, 초콜릿 케이크, 초콜릿 무스, 초콜릿 아이스크림, 초콜릿 쿠키...

1000616550.english: The moment I think of the word "chocolate," I feel nauseated. Help me...
1000616550.korean: - 머릿속에 초콜릿이라는 단어를 떠올리자마자 구역질이 올라온다. 살려줘...

1000616553.english: Oh, is it poison?! Hey, hurry up and call the chef and have her wash your stomach...!
1000616553.korean: 도, 독인가?! 어, 어서 주방장님을 불러서 위세척을...!

1000616554.english: - Aurora's eyes widened as she saw the chocolate wrappers piled up next to me.
1000616554.korean: - 내 옆에 쌓인 초콜릿 포장지를 본 아우로라의 눈이 휘둥그레졌다.

1000616555.english: Hey, you ate all of this? You might as well have just eaten poison...
1000616555.korean: 이, 이걸 다 먹은거야? 차라리 독을 먹은게 더 나았겠어...

1000616556.english: - Aurora, who had been looking back and forth between the chocolate wrapper, the stack of unopened chocolates, and me, sighed softly.
1000616556.korean: - 초콜릿 포장지와 아직 포장을 뜯지 않은 초콜릿 무더기, 그리고 나를 번갈아서 보며 우물쭈물하던 아우로라가 작게 한숨을 내쉬었다.

1000616558.english: The chef called me, so I came for a bit before she left... Over there...
1000616558.korean: 주방장님이 부르셔서 가기 전에 잠깐 왔는데... 저기...

1000616559.english: Ah! Let me organize this for you.

1000616560.english: - As Aurora reaches out, the messy wrapping paper begins to fold and organize.
1000616560.korean: - 아우로라가 손을 뻗자 어지럽게 널려 있던 포장지들이 착착 접혀 정리되기 시작한다.

1000616561.english: Ahahaha... There are people from Black River here too, and they're surprised by this?
1000616561.korean: 아하하... 여긴 블랙리버 분들도 계시는데 이걸로 놀라는거야?

1000616562.english: This is light, so you don't have to increase the output, so this level of control is possible.
1000616562.korean: 이건 가벼워서 출력을 안 높여도 되니까 이정도 제어는 가능해.

1000616563.english: - Aurora finished cleaning up in an instant and smiled while carrying her luggage.
1000616563.korean: - 순식간에 정리를 끝마친 아우로라가 뒷짐을 지고 웃었다.

1000616566.english: - I'm not confident even when I speak. Sowan cleverly twists my words to plot against me...
1000616566.korean: - 말하는 나도 자신이 없다. 소완은 내 말을 교묘하게 곡해해서 음모를 꾸미곤 하니까...

1000616570.english: Oh, no. I'll go alone. I'll get the chef's approval.
1000616570.korean: 아, 아냐. 혼자 갈게. 주방장님한테 인정받을거야.

1000616571.english: - At my vague cheer, Aurora waved her hand slightly from her chest and disappeared.
1000616571.korean: - 내 애매한 응원에 아우로라는 가슴께에서 살짝 손을 흔들고 사라졌다.

1000616572.english: - Now I have to eat the remaining chocolate...

1000616573.english: - I turned on the panel, trying to push the overwhelmingly large chocolate mountain out of my sight.
1000616573.korean: - 압도적인 부피의 초콜릿 산을 애써 시야 밖으로 밀어내며 패널을 켰다.

1000616574.english: - A list of currently operating units appeared on the screen synchronized with Orca's system.
1000616574.korean: - 오르카의 시스템과 동기화된 화면에 현재 작전중인 부대의 목록이 떠올랐다.

1000616575.english: [c][57e137]At the same time, Doom Bringer on a mission[-][/c]

1000616576.english: Sigh... What the hell is that during a mission.
1000616576.korean: 하아... 임무 중에 꼴이 그게 뭔가요.

1000616577.english: There's a limit to being too emotional. Has the captain already had about a dozen children in her head?
1000616577.korean: 마음이 앞선 것도 정도가 있지. 이미 대장 머리속에선 아이를 12명 정도는 낳았나요?

1000616580.english: Ha. You're so delusional, you haven't even held my hand yet. Talon Feather is going to cry.
1000616580.korean: 하. 아직 손도 못 잡아놓고 망상은 잘도 하는군요. 탈론페더가 울고가겠어요.

1000616581.english: This time, I'm going to hold your hand.

1000616582.english: Oh, do you have a plan? I know it's going to fail again, but let's give it a try.
1000616582.korean: 호오, 계획이라도 있습니까? 또 실패할 게 뻔하지만 한 번 들어나 보죠.

1000616586.english: Arm wrestling? Why is arm wrestling suddenly...

1000616587.english: Ah, ah! It's a blast! Let's get ready for battle!
1000616587.korean: 아, 앗! 철충 반응이에요! 어서 전투 준비를 하죠!

1000616588.english: It's okay, there's still some distance. It's a minor issue compared to the current situation.
1000616588.korean: 아직 거리가 있으니 괜찮습니다. 지금 이 사태에 비하면 사소한 문제입니다.

1000616589.english: Captain, did you just say arm wrestling?

1000616590.english: I guess no explanation is needed. It's very obvious.
1000616590.korean: 설명... 은 필요 없겠군요. 아주 명백해요.

1000616592.english: I can't just give you this chocolate I prepared, right?
1000616592.korean: 준비한 이 초콜릿을 그냥 줄 수는 없잖아?

1000616593.english: So I'm going to arm wrestle with the commander and tell him that if he wins, he'll give it to me.
1000616593.korean: 그러니까 사령관한테 팔씨름을 해서 날 이기면 준다고 할 거야.

1000616594.english: Then, the commander and the cow hold hands... and give each other chocolate...
1000616594.korean: 그러면 사령관이랑 소, 손도 잡고... 초콜릿도 주고...

1000616597.english: First, take a deep breath. Okay?

1000616598.english: What, what. Does the Colonel have a better plan?
1000616598.korean: 뭐, 뭐야. 대령은 더 좋은 계획이라도 있어?

1000616599.english: Then, please suggest it. I'll listen to it and if it's acceptable, I might consider reflecting it.
1000616599.korean: 그럼 건의해봐. 들어보고 괜찮으면 반영해 줄 수도 있어.

1000616601.english: All you have to do is run up to her and tell her you like her, that you love her, and then you can thrust your ugly chest into her, but that's the plan...
1000616601.korean: 그냥 달려가서 좋아한다고, 사랑한다고 말하면서 그 흉물스러운 가슴을 들이대기만 하면 끝나는 일인데, 계획이라...

1000616602.english: Hey, that's not why I'm doing this!
1000616602.korean: 그, 그건 못하니까 이러는 거 아냐!

1000616603.english: If I keep doing this, someday the commander will feel my heart...
1000616603.korean: 이, 이렇게라도 하다보면 언젠가 사령관도 내 마음을...

1000616604.english: Do you think the Commander is as stupid as the Captain?

1000616605.english: The Commander is a great leader and a capable operative.

1000616606.english: But... Commander, there's something even better than that.
1000616606.korean: 그런데... 사령관님은 그것보다도 훌륭한 점이 있으시죠.

1000616608.english: Yes, she is a warrior who has experienced all kinds of hardships.
1000616608.korean: 그렇습니다. 산전수전을 다 겪은 역전의 용사죠.

1000616609.english: Could it be that such a commander is unaware of the captain's shallow plan? Really?
1000616609.korean: 그런 사령관님이 과연 대장의 그 얄팍한 계획을 모르고 계실까요? 정말요?

1000616610.english: The Commander knows I like you...?
1000616610.korean: 사령관은 내가 좋아한다는 걸 알고 있단거야...?

1000616611.english: You might not have noticed before, but after winter...
1000616611.korean: 예전이었으면 모르셨을 수도 있을텐데, 아무래도 겨울 이후에는...

1000616613.english: Sigh... There is a limit to how foolish you can be when you fall in love.
1000616613.korean: 하아... 사랑에 빠지면 바보가 된다는 것도 정도가 있습니다.

1000616614.english: The old captain was a commanding officer worth working with, even if she was sometimes unlucky, but now...
1000616614.korean: 예전의 대장은 가끔 재수없을 때가 있긴 해도 함께할만한 지휘관이었는데, 지금은...

1000616616.english: The Commander knows, right? Then there's no need for me to give him the chocolate first.
1000616616.korean: 사령관은 알고 있다는 거지? 그러면 굳이 내가 먼저 초콜릿을 줄 필요도 없겠네.

1000616617.english: Sir! Shoot the missiles at Ironworm, not you!
1000616617.korean: 대, 대령님! 미사일은 대장님 말고 철충한테 쏴주세요!

1000616618.english: Rather than continue seeing this, I'd rather die with you. Don't try to stop me.
1000616618.korean: 이 꼴을 계속 보느니 그냥 같이 죽는게 낫겠습니다. 말리지 마세요.

1000616619.english: T-but there's a worm over there!

1000616620.english: Is that so? That's a good thing. Should I take you along as a companion?
1000616620.korean: 그렇습니까. 마침 잘됐군요. 길동무로 데려가도록 할까요.

1000616621.english: Well, it was an honor to fight together.

1000616623.english: That's it. First, let's make the most basic meringue cookie...
1000616623.korean: 다됐어요. 일단 가장 기본적인 머랭 쿠키를...

1000616624.english: Can such a simple thing satisfy the taste of the owner?
1000616624.korean: 이런 수수한 것으로 주인의 입맛을 사로잡을 수 있겠사옵니까?

1000616627.english: With a gorgeous yet understated decoration and strawberries...
1000616627.korean: 화려하면서도 과하지 않은 데코레이션과, 딸기를 곁들여서...

1000616628.english: The owner has already eaten a lot of chocolate.

1000616629.english: There's chocolate cake again... You're short-sighted.
1000616629.korean: 거기에 또다시 초콜릿 케이크라니... 생각이 짧으셨사옵니다.

1000616633.english: What, what did you put on it... that...

1000616635.english: Indeed, it is the Aurora model.

1000616636.english: As for desserts, they are comparable to Socheop.
1000616636.korean: 디저트에 한해서는 소첩과 견주어도 손색이 없사옵니다.

1000616637.english: Oh, thank you for your words...

1000616639.english: We will be serving Miss Aurora's dessert for the next meal, so we will match the main course to that dessert.
1000616639.korean: 다음 식사에 아우로라 양의 디저트를 정식으로 선보일테니, 메인 요리를 그 디저트에 맞추도록 하겠사옵니다.

1000616642.english: Oh, no! I'll work hard! But, more than that...
1000616642.korean: 아, 아뇨! 열심히 할게요! 그, 그것보다...

1000616643.english: Um, you definitely said some harsh things to me last time, but today...
1000616643.korean: 저, 저번에는 분명 저한테... 그, 심한 말을 하셨었는데, 오늘은...

1000616644.english: ...I've been treating others kindly, following my master's instructions...
1000616644.korean: ...그간 주인의 말씀에 따라 다른 분들에게 상냥하게 대하고 있었사온데...

1000616645.english: I saw a stranger serving food to the owner and...
1000616645.korean: 처음 보는 분이 주인께 음식을 대접하는 것을 보고 그만...

1000616648.english: Haha, and my wish is to treat my master to the best banquet at every meal.
1000616648.korean: 후후, 그리고 제 바람은 매 끼니마다 주인께 최상의 만찬을 대접하는 것.

1000616649.english: If it's necessary, I wouldn't hesitate to crawl through the mud, but it's only natural to share the work with someone more capable.
1000616649.korean: 그것에 필요하다면 진흙탕을 기는 것도 마다하지 않을 것일진데, 실력있는 분과 분담하는 것은 오히려 당연한 것이옵니다.

1000616650.english: Sowan! I came to give chocolate to the master!

1000616652.english: Haha, that's right. It was worth all the hard work.
1000616652.korean: 후후, 그렇사옵니까. 열심히 만든 보람이 있었사옵니다.

1000616653.english: Now then... can you help the others in the kitchen make chocolate?
1000616653.korean: 이제 그럼... 주방에서 다른 분들이 초콜릿을 만드는 것을 도와주실 수 있사옵니까?

1000616655.english: Is there anything else you need to do?

1000616656.english: Yes! Sister Lilith is looking for a way to save Kakao, so we need to go talk to her.
1000616656.korean: 네! 리리스 언니가 카카오를 구할 방법을 찾고 계셔서, 같이 이야기하러 가야해요.

1000616657.english: Is that so? Well, then there's nothing we can do. Don't worry about this place...
1000616657.korean: 그렇사옵니까. 그렇다면 어쩔 수 없지요. 이곳은 걱정 마시고...

1000616658.english: I heard Lise is going too... I'm worried they'll fight...

1000616659.english: Oh, I should go now. I'll be back!

1000616662.english: I heard that you used to only know how to make meat pies, but thanks to the chef's guidance, you've become able to make many other things...
1000616662.korean: 미트파이만 만들 줄 알다가 주방장님의 지도로 여러가지를 할 수 있게 되셨다고 들었...

1000616666.english: Haha... There's no way a concubine would give up on gaining her master's favor.
1000616666.korean: 후후... 소첩이 주인의 총애를 얻는 것을 포기할리가 없잖사옵니까.

1000616667.english: Just because you lay down quietly for a while, you let your guard down...
1000616667.korean: 한동안 조용히 엎드려 있었다하여 경계심을 풀다니...

1000616668.english: Hehe, there really is no clown.

1000616669.english: Chef, sir? Your personality seems to have changed since a little while ago...?
1000616669.korean: 주, 주방장님? 조금 전이랑 성격이 바뀌신 것 같은데요...?

1000616670.english: Haha, excuse me. I'm a little... excited, since I've finally achieved my goal.
1000616670.korean: 후후, 실례하였사옵니다. 마침내 목적을 달성할 수 있게되었기에, 조금... 들떴사옵니다.

1000616671.english: Miss Aurora. That's all for today.

1000616672.english: I have something urgent to do, so...
1000616672.korean: 소첩은 급히 할 일이 생겼사오니, 그럼...

1000616673.english: Is there anything I can help you with? Then...
1000616673.korean: 혹시 제가 도와드릴 수 있는 일인가요? 그러면...

1000616675.english: ...That was a slip of the tongue. I need Miss Aurora's help.

1000616678.english: Oh, blood? I'll prepare it right away!

1000616680.english: You, Aurora model, have a sweet element flowing through you that captivates men.
1000616680.korean: 당신, 아우로라 모델에겐 남성을 홀리는 달콤한 성분이 흐르고 있다지요.

1000616681.english: I don't know how well it will work with you, Master, but there's no harm in trying...
1000616681.korean: 그것이 주인께 얼마나 통할지는 모르겠사오나, 시도해서 손해볼 것은 없으니...

1000616682.english: Yes, yes?! What do you mean?!

1000616683.english: Ahahaha, Chef...? Why are you raising your knife... Gyaaaaah!
1000616683.korean: 아하하, 주, 주방장님...? 왜 칼을 들어올리시는... 꺄아아아아!

1000616684.english: - Orca has a few members that are particularly fun to tease.
1000616684.korean: - 오르카에는 특히 놀리기 좋은 대원들이 몇 있다.

1000616685.english: - Among them, the one who is fighting for first place is...

1000616686.english: Why do you look like that?

1000616687.english: - From our first meeting, which now feels like a very long time ago, May was definitely the most difficult commander to deal with.
1000616687.korean: - 이젠 아주 먼 과거로 느껴지는 첫 만남때, 메이는 분명 가장 대하기 어려운 지휘관이었다.

1000616688.english: - Unlike other commanders who don't show it outwardly even if I make a mistake, Mei directly trampled on my feelings, calling me a foolish commander, an idiot, and so on...
1000616688.korean: - 내가 실수를 해도 겉으로는 내색하지 않는 다른 지휘관들과는 달리 메이는 바보 사령관이라느니, 멍청이라느니 직설적으로 내 마음을 유린했었으니까...

1000616689.english: - Well, I can't say that that's not part of the reason you're teasing me like this right now.
1000616689.korean: - 뭐, 지금 이렇게 놀리는 이유에 그게 포함되지 않는다고는 말 못하겠다.

1000616690.english: - To help Mei, who rarely speaks, start the conversation first, Mei, as if she had just realized it, nonchalantly offered the chocolate.
1000616690.korean: - 좀처럼 입을 열지 못하는 메이를 위해 먼저 말을 꺼내자 메이는 마치 지금 눈치챘다는 듯 천연덕스럽게 초콜릿을 내밀었다.

1000616691.english: Oh, this? I forgot about it.

1000616692.english: I made this to kill time. It would be a shame to throw it away, so I'll give it to you, Commander.
1000616692.korean: 심심풀이로 만들어 봤어. 버리기는 아까우니까 사령관 줄게.

1000616693.english: Don't get me wrong, it wasn't really made for commanders.
1000616693.korean: 착각하지 마. 별로 사령관을 위해서 만든 건 아니니까.

1000616694.english: - I barely managed to suppress the laughter that threatened to burst out at the sudden surprise attack.
1000616694.korean: - 갑작스러운 기습에 터져나오려는 웃음을 간신히 참아냈다.

1000616695.english: - May is using the lines that Undine and Sirene practiced in the box with Feather the other day very naturally...
1000616695.korean: - 저번에 페더와 같이 상자 속에서 들었던, 운디네와 세이렌이 연습하던 대사를 메이는 아주 자연스럽게 구사하는구나...

1000616696.english: - The chocolate disappeared just before I accepted it.

1000616697.english: I guess I can't just give it away. I have to save face as Commander Doom Bringer.
1000616697.korean: 역시 그냥 주는건 안되겠어. 둠브링어 지휘관의 체면이 있지.

1000616698.english: Let's make a bet... I'll give it to you if you win, Commander. What do you think?
1000616698.korean: 나랑 내, 내기를 해서... 사령관이 이기면 줄게. 어때?

1000616699.english: What, what is it? It's a chance to receive chocolates I made!
1000616699.korean: 뭐, 뭐야. 내가 만든 초콜릿을 받을 수 있는 기회라고!

1000616700.english: - Perhaps misunderstanding that I was hesitating to bite my tongue to keep from laughing, May hastily sat down in front of me.
1000616700.korean: - 웃음을 참기 위해 혀를 깨무는 걸 망설이는 것이라고 오해했는지, 메이는 다급히 내 앞에 앉았다.

1000616701.english: Okay, Commander, you should also get your hands on it.

1000616702.english: The betting event is arm wrestling. Hurry up.

1000616703.english: - May's physical abilities are not strong for a Bioroid due to the nature of her abilities.
1000616703.korean: - 메이는 능력 특성상 바이오로이드 치고는 신체능력이 강하지 않다.

1000616705.english: - I brought my index and middle fingers together and placed them on May's slender wrist.
1000616705.korean: - 검지와 중지 두 손가락을 모아 메이의 가느다란 손목에 가져다 댔다.

1000616707.english: Again, do it right, you idiot commander! Are you looking down on me?!
1000616707.korean: 또, 똑바로 하라고 멍청이 사령관! 나를 얕보는거야?!

1000616709.english: - May shuddered as I obediently held her hand.
1000616709.korean: - 고분고분 손을 맞잡자 메이가 몸을 움찔 떨었다.

1000616711.english: - May, who had been fidgeting with her fingers for a while, put some strength into her hand.
1000616711.korean: - 한동안 손가락을 꼼지락대던 메이가 손에 살짝 힘을 줬다.

1000616712.english: - When the strength was adjusted appropriately, May's competitive spirit was stimulated and she started to use all her strength.
1000616712.korean: - 적당히 힘을 맞춰주니 메이는 오히려 승부욕을 자극당했는지 있는힘을 다하기 시작했다.

1000616713.english: Ugh... the strength... why is it so strong...!
1000616713.korean: 익... 힘은 또... 왜 이렇게 센 거야...!

1000616715.english: - May slowly released the strength from her hand.

1000616716.english: ...I'm exhausted. If you want to win, win.

1000616717.english: - May's face began to turn red as she remained still with her hand held in the exact center.
1000616717.korean: - 정 중앙에 잡은 손을 둔 채로 가만히 있자 메이의 얼굴이 점점 붉어지기 시작했다.

1000616718.english: - I slowly put strength into my hands.

1000616719.english: - May, who had been wiggling her fingers for a while even after her small hand touched the desk, suddenly took her hand away.
1000616719.korean: - 작은 손, 그 손등이 책상에 닿고나서도 한동안 손가락을 꼬물대던 메이가 화들짝 손을 뗐다.

1000616720.english: Hmm, huh. A commander should have this much power. Don't get too excited.
1000616720.korean: 흐, 흥. 사령관이라면 이정도 힘은 있어야지. 너무 좋아하지 마.

1000616722.english: - May, who had obediently handed over the chocolate, got up from her seat.
1000616722.korean: - 순순히 초콜릿을 건네준 메이가 자리를 털고 일어났다.

1000616723.english: Eat it all by yourself. I won't forgive you if you give it to someone else... Huh?!
1000616723.korean: 혼자서 전부 먹어. 다른 애한테 주면 용서안할테니... 꺅?!

1000616724.english: - May's small body, which had let out an innocent scream, stiffened in her arms.
1000616724.korean: - 순진한 비명소리를 낸 메이의 작은 몸이 품 안에서 뻣뻣하게 굳어졌다.

1000616726.english: - I released the arm that was holding May and gently stroked her head.
1000616726.korean: - 메이를 껴안은 팔을 풀어주고 머리를 살살 쓰다듬었다.

1000616727.english: - Even after being stroked and her bangs were fixed, May, who still couldn't grasp the situation, screamed.
1000616727.korean: - 실컷 쓰다듬고 앞머리를 정리해줄때까지도 상황파악을 못하고 있던 메이가 소리를 질렀다.

1000616728.english: Ugh, hey! Stop patting my head!

1000616729.english: Hey, if you treat me like a child again, I won't let you off easy!

1000616730.english: - May went out the door, grumbling.

1000616731.english: - I said it half seriously and half teasingly, but the reaction was more intense than I expected. I guess I'll have to calm her down later.
1000616731.korean: - 진심 반 놀림 반으로 했는데 생각보다 반응이 격렬하다. 나중에 달래줘야겠군.

1000616732.english: Commander, just now, Miss May was running away screaming...
1000616732.korean: 사령관, 방금 메이 씨가 꺄아아악 하고 비명을 지르면서 뛰어가던데...

1000616733.english: - There's a bandage on Aurora's index finger that I've never seen before.
1000616733.korean: - 아우로라의 검지 손가락에 못보던 반창고가 붙어있다.

1000616735.english: Dee, I got a little cut while making dessert. Hahaha...
1000616735.korean: 디, 디저트 만들다가 조금 베였어. 아하하...

1000616736.english: - Aurora, who was smiling awkwardly, looked at the chocolate that was still piled up like a mountain.
1000616736.korean: - 난처하게 웃던 아우로라가 여전히 산더미처럼 남아있는 초콜릿에 눈길을 줬다.

1000616738.english: - I offered a chair to Aurora, who was looking a little gloomy, and sat down as well.
1000616738.korean: - 조금 시무룩해진 아우로라에게 의자를 권하고 나도 자리에 앉았다.

1000616739.english: Oh, yeah! It actually worked out well. The chef approved of my dessert.
1000616739.korean: 아, 응! 오히려 잘 풀렸어. 주방장님이 내 디저트를 인정해주셨거든.

1000616740.english: From now on, I will be in charge of the desserts and snacks that the commander will eat.
1000616740.korean: 앞으로 사령관이 먹을 후식이랑 간식은 내가 담당할거야.

1000616741.english: Oh, and Commander. This may be a bit new, but... I didn't give it to you properly last time, so...
1000616741.korean: 아, 그리고 사령관. 저기, 새삼스럽기는 한데... 저번에는 제대로 못 줬으니까, 저기...

1000616744.english: Can I ask you a favor tonight?

1000616746.english: - There are many agents who throw fastballs, but this one is so out of the blue...
1000616746.korean: - 돌직구를 던지는 대원들은 많이 있지만 이건 뜬금없어도 너무 없는데...

1000616747.english: - After a while, the sound of footsteps was heard outside the open door.
1000616747.korean: - 잠시후 열린 문 밖에서 도도도하는 발소리가 들려왔다.

1000616750.english: I'm so frustrated I can't stand it anymore.

1000616751.english: Commander, do you know what this idiot captain said to me just now?
1000616751.korean: 사령관님, 방금전에 이 바보 대장이 저한테 와서 뭐라고 하셨는지 아십니까?

1000616752.english: Nana, the Commander just hugged me! I guess we're on good terms now...' Ugh!
1000616752.korean: 나나나 방금 사령관이 안아줬어! 이제 그런 사이가 된 거겠...' 읍!

1000616755.english: - How on earth should I explain this situation?
1000616755.korean: - 이걸 대체 무슨 상황이라고 설명해야 하는걸까.

1000616756.english: - Even while I was choosing my words, May and Night Angel were bickering.
1000616756.korean: - 내가 말을 고르는 동안에도 메이와 나이트앤젤은 티격태격하고있다.

1000616757.english: - Royal Arsenal looked at that, shrugged, and opened their mouths again.
1000616757.korean: - 로열 아스널은 그걸 보고 어깨를 으쓱하고는 다시 입을 열었다.

1000616758.english: Shouldn't we be heading back to Orca soon? Cannonier and I will be your escorts.
1000616758.korean: 슬슬 오르카로 돌아가야하지 않나. 나와 캐노니어가 호위를 맡지.

1000616759.english: - As I sat down on the chair and opened the panel, Royal Arsenal came over, sat down on the desk with her legs crossed, and leaned over to me.
1000616759.korean: - 의자에 앉아 패널을 열자 로열 아스널이 다가와 책상에 다리를 꼬고 앉아 나에게 몸을 숙였다.

1000616760.english: Commander, you haven't forgotten, have you?

1000616761.english: I mean, I ask you to take good care of me.

1000616762.english: Safely escorting the Supreme Commander... seems like a job worth being rewarded for.
1000616762.korean: 최고사령관을 안전하게 호위하는 건... 충분히 보상을 받을만한 일인 것 같다만.

1000616763.english: - I don't think it's worth talking about compensation, but...
1000616763.korean: - 보상을 따지고 말고 할 일도 아니라고 생각하지만, 뭐...

1000616764.english: - Royal Arsenal chuckled at my boastful answer and whispered in my ear.
1000616764.korean: - 힘껏 허세를 부린 대답에 로열 아스널은 피식 웃고는 내 귓가에 속삭였다.

1000616766.english: Then I'll go down first and get ready.

1000616768.english: - I sighed and tried to contact the agents at the castle, but then I saw May, frozen like a stone.
1000616768.korean: - 한숨을 내쉬고 성에 와있는 대원들에게 연락을 돌리려다 돌처럼 굳어있는 메이가 눈에 들어왔다.

1000616769.english: Don't worry about it. I'll take care of it.

1000616770.english: - When we returned to Orca, it was already dark.

1000616771.english: - After returning to the captain's quarters after a late dinner and Aurora's secret dessert, a knock rang out on the door.
1000616771.korean: - 늦은 저녁과 아우로라의 비장의 디저트를 먹고 함장실로 돌아오고 난 뒤 얼마 후, 노크 소리가 울렸다.

1000616772.english: - I opened the door, mentally preparing myself.

1000616775.english: - Emily nodded her head sleepily and confidently crawled into my bed.
1000616775.korean: - 잠에 취해 멍하게 고개를 끄덕인 에밀리는 당당하게 내 침대로 파고들었다.

1000616777.english: - Tiamat entered the room cautiously and looked up at me with a look of wanting something.
1000616777.korean: - 조심스레 방으로 들어온 티아멧은 무언가 원하는 표정으로 나를 올려다봤다.

1000616778.english: - As soon as I sat down on the chair, Tiamat ran over and sat on my lap.
1000616778.korean: - 내가 의자에 앉자 후다닥 달려온 티아멧이 내 무릎 위에 앉았다.

1000616779.english: - Tiamat, who had been rubbing her cheek against my chest for a while, raised her head.
1000616779.korean: - 한동안 가슴팍에 볼을 부비던 티아멧이 고개를 들었다.

1000616780.english: Commander, you fell asleep first last time, didn't you?

1000616781.english: It's fatal. I just... got the courage to tell you.

1000616782.english: - Tiamat, who came to my room last time, kept talking about all sorts of things that seemed good.
1000616782.korean: - 저번에 방으로 찾아온 티아멧은 아무래도 좋을 이런저런 이야기를 늘어놓았다.

1000616783.english: - Of course, that in itself was good evidence that she had opened her heart, but I could feel Tiamat's hesitation whenever she paused in her speech.
1000616783.korean: - 물론 그 자체도 마음을 열어준 증거일테니 좋았지만, 중간중간 말을 멈출때마다 티아멧의 망설임이 느껴졌었다.

1000616785.english: Last time... the Commander fell asleep first, and I slept next to him. I hugged him tightly...
1000616785.korean: 저번에... 사령관이 먼저 잠드시고 저도 옆에서 잤어요. 사령관을 꼭 껴안고...

1000616786.english: That day... For the first time in my life, I didn't have a nightmare.
1000616786.korean: 그 날... 태어나서 처음으로 악몽을 안 꿨어요.

1000616787.english: - Tiamat turned and leaned back against me.
1000616787.korean: - 티아멧은 몸을 돌려 내게 등을 기댔다.

1000616788.english: Of course, when I was being experimented on in the lab, when I was alone after the humans disappeared, when I was fighting in the resistance, and even when I came to see the commander...
1000616788.korean: 연구소에서 실험당할 때는 물론, 인간님들이 사라지고 혼자 있을 때, 저항군으로 싸울 때, 그리고 사령관에게 와서도...

1000616789.english: There wasn't a single day that I didn't have nightmares.
1000616789.korean: 단 하루도, 악몽을 꾸지 않은 날이 없었어요.

1000616790.english: What happened at that lab... Do you know, Commander?
1000616790.korean: 그 연구소에서 벌어진 일들... 사령관은 아시나요?

1000616791.english: - As Aurora said last time, there are quite a few Bioroids from the Black River research lab in Orca.
1000616791.korean: - 저번 아우로라의 말마따나, 오르카엔 블랙리버의 연구소 출신 바이오로이드들이 꽤나 있다.

1000616792.english: - I didn't really try to dig into it until you told me, but I was able to get a glimpse of what happened back then through the leaked reactions and remaining records.
1000616792.korean: - 먼저 말해주기 전까진 굳이 파헤치려하지는 않았지만, 새어나오는 반응과 남아있는 기록으로 단편적으로나마 그때 벌어졌던 일들을 알 수 있었다.

1000616793.english: Haha, thank goodness Bioroid is strong. It got hit a lot...
1000616793.korean: 후후, 바이오로이드는 튼튼해서 다행이에요. 많이... 맞았으니까요.

1000616794.english: If you fail to properly achieve your goals, or make mistakes during a mock operation... always...
1000616794.korean: 제대로 목표치를 달성하지 못하거나, 모의 작전중에 실수를 하거나 하면... 항상...

1000616796.english: Still, that physical pain was okay. The pain was fleeting, and God healed my wounds. However...
1000616796.korean: 그래도 그런 신체의 고통은 괜찮았어요. 고통스러운 건 한순간이고, 상처는 치료해주셨으니까요. 다만...

1000616797.english: Every time I failed, other... Bioroids were sacrificed.
1000616797.korean: 제가 성과를 내지 못할 때마다, 다른... 바이오로이드 분들이 희생당했어요.

1000616798.english: As you know, Commander, I was a machine that Black River had created at the time by concentrating all of its technology.
1000616798.korean: 사령관도 아시겠지만, 저는 당시 블랙리버가 모든 기술을 집약시켜 만든 기체였어요.

1000616799.english: If a flaw was discovered in me... the Bioroids who specialized in that field and technology... were subjected to terrible experiments.
1000616799.korean: 그런 제게서 결함이 발견되면... 그 분야, 그 기술만 특화시켜 만든 바이오로이드 분들이... 끔찍한 실험을 당했어요.

1000616800.english: Since we didn't want our expensive test equipment to break, we used other people to get data and feedback.
1000616800.korean: 비싼 실험기가 부서져 버리면 안되니까, 데이터와 피드백을 얻기 위해 다른 분들을 이용한거죠.

1000616801.english: You're not allowed to close your eyes or cover your ears, you're just...
1000616801.korean: 눈을 감는 것도, 귀를 막는 것도 허락받지 못하고, 그저...

1000616802.english: - I hugged Tiamat's trembling body from behind.
1000616802.korean: - 가늘게 떨리는 티아멧의 몸을 뒤에서 끌어안았다.

1000616803.english: That scene and those desperate screams... I dreamed about them every day. And every time I made a mistake or failed to perform, the screams grew louder...
1000616803.korean: 그 장면과 처절한 비명소리를... 매일 꿈에서 봤어요. &n제가 실수하거나, 제 성능을 내지 못할 때마다 늘어가는 비명소리들을...

1000616804.english: - Tiamat gently placed her hand on the back of my hand.
1000616804.korean: - 티아멧은 내 손등에 손을 살짝 얹었다.

1000616805.english: And what was scarier than that was the look in the eyes of the humans looking at them and me.
1000616805.korean: 그리고 그것보다 무서웠던건, 그분들과 저를 바라보는 인간님들의 눈빛이었어요.

1000616806.english: It's a look that seems to be looking at a tool or trash, not a person.
1000616806.korean: 인격체가 아닌, 도구나 쓰레기를 보는 듯한 눈빛이요.

1000616807.english: - Tiamat turned around again and sat down facing me on her lap.
1000616807.korean: - 티아멧은 다시 몸을 돌려 무릎 위에서 나와 마주보고 앉았다.

1000616808.english: So... when I first saw the Commander, I didn't believe him.

1000616809.english: Because I never thought there would be a human being who would look at me so warmly.
1000616809.korean: 그렇게 따뜻하게 저를 바라봐주는 인간님이 계실거라는 생각이 들지 않았으니까요.

1000616811.english: Haha... I was so happy every time the commander gave me candy.
1000616811.korean: 후후... 사령관이 사탕을 주실때마다 너무 기뻤어요.

1000616812.english: I don't know how many times I held back the urge to run over and hug you right now.
1000616812.korean: 당장이라도 달려가서 안기고 싶은걸 몇 번이나 참았는지 몰라요.

1000616813.english: Still, I was afraid of being betrayed, and I wondered what I would do if the Commander was actually that kind of person...
1000616813.korean: 그래도 배신 당할까봐, 사령관도 사실 그런 인간님이라면 어떡하지 하는 생각에...

1000616814.english: - I tapped Tiamat on the forehead.

1000616815.english: Haha, yeah. Really... I was stupid.

1000616816.english: - He hugged Tiamat tightly as she dug into my arms.

1000616818.english: - Tiamat, who had been silently hugging me for a while, peeked out her eyes and looked up at me.
1000616818.korean: - 한동안 말없이 안겨있던 티아멧이 눈만 빼꼼 내밀어 나를 올려다봤다.

1000616819.english: - Tiamat smiled faintly as she slowly swept her blue hair.
1000616819.korean: - 푸른 머리카락을 천천히 쓸어내리자 티아멧이 작게 웃음지었다.

1000616820.english: Commander, can I sleep in today?
1000616820.korean: 사령관, 저 오늘도 자고 가도 되나요?

1000616821.english: - "Tell me later, when you're ready," I said, and picked Tiamat up and laid her on the bed.
1000616821.korean: - 나중에 마음의 준비가 되고 나서 천천히 말해줘. 하고 말하고 티아멧을 안아들어 침대에 눕혔다.

1000616823.english: - I lay down between Tiamat and Emily, and Emily, who was sleeping peacefully, was hugged.
1000616823.korean: - 티아멧과 에밀리 사이에 누우니 얌전히 자고 있던 에밀리가 안겨들었다.

1000616824.english: - Even Tiamat took my arm without permission and used it as a pillow...
1000616824.korean: - 질새라 티아멧도 내 팔을 멋대로 가져가서 팔베개를 하고...

1000616826.english: - I closed my eyes and shortly after, I heard even breathing from both sides.
1000616826.korean: - 눈을 감고 얼마 지나지 않아 양쪽에서 고른 숨소리가 들려왔다.

1000616827.english: - Just as I was about to slowly surrender myself to the water, a knock sounded.
1000616827.korean: - 나도 천천히 수마에 몸을 맡기려고 할 때, 노크소리가 울렸다.

1000616828.english: Oh, there were passengers? Were we a step too late?
1000616828.korean: 이런. 선객이 있었나? 한 발 늦었군.

1000616829.english: But still, I'm okay with many people.

1000616830.english: - A scheduled visitor, who had been completely forgotten while talking to Tiamat, has arrived.
1000616830.korean: - 티아멧과 이야기하느라 까맣게 잊은 예정된 방문자가 찾아왔다.

1000616831.english: - Royal Arsenal nodded coolly as she watched Emily and Tiamat sleeping soundly.
1000616831.korean: - 곤히 잠들어 있는 에밀리와 티아멧의 모습을 본 로열 아스널이 선선히 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000616832.english: That's true. I can't look disheveled in front of Emily.
1000616832.korean: 확실히 그렇군. 에밀리의 앞에서 흐트러진 모습을 보일 수는 없으니.

1000616834.english: - I looked back at Tiamat and Emily at the Royal Arsenal. They were both asleep, their faces innocent.
1000616834.korean: - 로열 아스널에 말에 새삼스레 티아멧과 에밀리를 돌아보았다. 둘 다 천진한 얼굴로 잠들어있다.

1000616835.english: Well, if that's what the Commander says.

1000616836.english: Then, the Canonical meeting that was called at great length would have been useless.
1000616836.korean: 그러면 기껏 소집한 캐노니어 회의도 쓸데없는 것이 되어버렸군.

1000616837.english: It's nothing special. We just had a quick chat about how we could connect Emily with the Commander.
1000616837.korean: 별 거 아니다. '어떻게 하면 에밀리를 사령관과 이어줄 수 있을까' 라는 주제로 간단히 이야기를 나눴었거든.

1000616838.english: Since the commander gave the clue of 'not yet', it's only a matter of time.
1000616838.korean: 사령관이 '아직은' 이라는 단서를 달았으니 결국 시간문제라는 거지.

1000616840.english: Well... it's a shame, but I guess I'll have to hand over the command to the cute kids today. Oh, before that.
1000616840.korean: 그럼... 아쉽지만 오늘은 귀여운 아이들에게 사령관을 양보하도록 할까. 아, 그전에.

1000616841.english: - Royal Arsenal turned around and smiled her signature smile.
1000616841.korean: - 몸을 돌리다가 만 로열 아스널이 그 특유의 미소를 지었다.

1000616842.english: I'm always ready, so you can call me anytime.
1000616842.korean: 난 항상 준비되어있으니 언제든지 불러도 괜찮다.

1000616843.english: Haha, are you done showing off now?

1000616844.english: Well, it's best to do it naturally. Even without such bravado, I know the night commander is a different person from the day commander.
1000616844.korean: 뭐, 자연스럽게 하는게 좋겠지. 그렇게 허세를 부리지 않아도 밤의 사령관은 낮의 사령관과는 다른 사람인 건 잘 알고있으니까.

1000616845.english: Anger of the Horde... name is Talon Feather.
1000616845.korean: 앵거 오브 호드의... 이름이 탈론 페더던가.

1000616846.english: I was provided with various materials that I thought would help me understand the commander.
1000616846.korean: 사령관을 이해하는데에 도움이 될 거라고 이것저것 자료를 제공받았지.

1000616847.english: - Royal Arsenal, who was laughing loudly unlike usual, turned around and waved goodbye before leaving.
1000616847.korean: - 평소와는 달리 소리죽여 큭큭 웃던 로열 아스널은 뒤로 돈 채 손만 들어 인사하곤 떠나갔다.

1000616848.english: - ...I'll have to think more carefully about restoring the commander level in the future.

1000616849.english: - I laid back down on the bed, my body suddenly tired.
1000616849.korean: - 급격히 피로해진 몸을 다시 침대에 뉘었다.

1000616850.english: - A faint smile was playing on Tiamat's lips as she was hugged in her sleep, wondering what she was dreaming about.
1000616850.korean: - 무슨 꿈을 꾸고 있는지, 잠결에 안겨드는 티아멧의 입가엔 희미한 미소가 감돌고 있었다.

1000616852.english: You idiot! What did you hear, stalker? This isn't chocolate, it's cocoa cryogenics.
1000616852.korean: 멍청하긴! 스토커, 뭘 들은 거야? 여긴 초콜릿이 아니라 카카오 극저온 보관고야.

1000616853.english: Cacao? Oh… Did you say you could make chocolate with that?
1000616853.korean: 카카오? 아… 그걸로 초콜릿을 만들 수 있다고 했었나?

1000616854.english: Yeah. Remember, stalker. You can't miss this opportunity.
1000616854.korean: 그래. 명심해, 스토커. 이번 기회를 놓칠 순 없어.

1000616855.english: I make the best chocolate with the best ingredients. If anything gets in the way, I'll just throw it away, so just know that.
1000616855.korean: 최고의 재료로 최고의 초컬릿을 만드는 거야. 방해가 되면 그대로 버릴 테니 그렇게 알고 있어.

1000616856.english: Ah… the best chocolate… sweet romance… and then you too, Master…
1000616856.korean: 아… 최고의 초콜릿… 달콤한 로맨스… 그러면 주인님도…

1000616857.english: Ah! Master! That's right. Hehe... This time, it's brain death!
1000616857.korean: 아! 주인님! 맞아. 후후…. 이번에야 말로 뇌살!

1000616858.english: I'm going to cover the empty part of the swimsuit I made last time with chocolate! Hehehe!
1000616858.korean: 저번에 만든 수영복의 빈 부분을 초콜릿으로 덮고 가는 거야! 히히히!

1000616859.english: Stop doing such dirty things, you stalker! What are you doing while someone else is imagining happiness?
1000616859.korean: 추잡스러운 짓 좀 하지마, 이 스토커! 남이 행복한 상상을 하는데 뭐하는 짓이야?

1000616860.english: Hehehe... Pest... The master is mine! You can only imagine.
1000616860.korean: 히히… 해충… 주인님은 내 거야! 넌 상상만 해.

1000616861.english: Phew… Even if it weren't for Miss Leah, I wouldn't have brought a stalker like you…
1000616861.korean: 후우… 레아 씨만 아니더라도 너 같은 스토커는 안 데리고 오는 건데…

1000616862.english: Whatever you imagine, it doesn't matter, but remember: &n Even with chocolate, it's me first, then you. Got it?
1000616862.korean: 너 혼자 상상은 뭘 하든지 상관 없지만 어쨌든 기억해. &n초콜릿도 내가 먼저, 그 다음이 너야. 알겠어?

1000616863.english: Haha… That's what my sister said. The troops that followed us were my request, so don't be discouraged.
1000616863.korean: 후후… 언니가 그랬어. 우릴 따라온 병력은 언니가 부탁한 거니까 기 죽지 말라고.

1000616864.english: The order is Metal Parasite… whoever catches more pests goes first.
1000616864.korean: 순서는 철충… 그 해충들을 더 많이 잡은 쪽이 먼저야.

1000616865.english: … When did you get so smart? Did you take some medicine the doctor gave you?
1000616865.korean: … 언제 저렇게 지능이 올라간 거야? 너 혹시 닥터가 준 약이라도 먹은 거야?

1000616866.english: Hehehe… Because my sister taught me what to do.
1000616866.korean: 히히… 언니가 어떻게 해야 할 지 가르쳐 줬으니까.

1000616867.english: Love alone isn't enough to conquer the master... From that day on...
1000616867.korean: 주인님을 차지하기 위해서는 사랑만으론 부족하다고… 그 날 이후론…

1000616868.english: That day? Ahhh… Tsk… That damn day…
1000616868.korean: 그 날? 아아… 칫… 그 빌어먹을 날…

1000616869.english: I watched it with tears in my eyes. My sister was upset too. If only I had acted wisely...
1000616869.korean: 피눈물을 흘리면서 봤어. 언니도 화가 났어. 내가 좀 더 현명하게 했으면…

1000616870.english: Instead of the master tying up that red-headed pest there… I'll tie up the master and make sure he can't go anywhere.
1000616870.korean: 거기서 주인님이 그 머리 붉은 해충을 묶는 게 아니라… 내가 주인님을 묶어서 어디에도 못 가게 할 텐데.

1000616871.english: You stupid stalker! Tie up the master! How presumptuous…
1000616871.korean: 이 멍청한 스토커! 주인님을 묶다니! 건방지게…

1000616872.english: That way… my master won't be able to escape from me…
1000616872.korean: 그래야… 주인님이 내게서 벗어나지 못할 테니…

1000616874.english: If you tie up the master... you will become my own master!
1000616874.korean: 주인님을 묶으면… 나만의 주인님이 되는 거야!

1000616875.english: Ugh... That's... But... Anyway, be quiet! You're my master... Stalker, this is your only chance...
1000616875.korean: 윽… 그건.. 그렇지만… 어쨌든 시끄러워! 주인님은 내 주인님이니까… 스토커 너한테 기회는 이번 뿐일 테니…

1000616876.english: Remember. Besides, the troops you sent aren't just the ones your sister sent. Remember, I have plenty of them too.
1000616876.korean: 기억해 둬. 게다가, 병력도 너희 언니가 보내준 병력만 있는 건 아니니까. 내 병력도 많이 있다는 걸 기억해.

1000616878.english: What are you thinking about again? It's so annoying...
1000616878.korean: 또 무슨 생각을 하는 거야? 기분 나쁘게…

1000616879.english: Pests, you can't do as you please. I'll cut down all the Metal Parasites.
1000616879.korean: 해충, 네 마음대로는 안 돼. 철충들은 내가 모두 잘라 버릴 테니까.

1000616880.english: I should make it pretty… in the shape of a heart and give it to my master~!
1000616880.korean: 예쁘게… 하트 모양으로 만들어서 주인님께 가져다 드려야지~!

1000616881.english: Please do so. The master will be very pleased.
1000616881.korean: 제발 그렇게 해. 주인님께서 아주 기뻐하실 테니.

1000616882.english: Well, I'm sure you'll never get a chance.
1000616882.korean: 뭐, 너한테 절대로 기회가 안 갈 거란 건 확실하네.

1000616883.english: Hehehehe! Gossiping like that won't help. You're the one who shouldn't imitate me. I'll chop you up into tiny pieces.
1000616883.korean: 히히히힛! 그런 험담해도 소용없어. 너야말로 날 흉내내지마. 잘게 잘라 버릴 거야.

1000616884.english: I was stupid to think I could have a normal conversation with you.
1000616884.korean: 너랑 정상적인 이야길 할 수 있을 거라고 생각한 내가 멍청했어.

1000616885.english: Phew… First, let's get some cocoa to make chocolate. After that… let's think about that later.
1000616885.korean: 후… 일단은 초콜릿을 만들 카카오나 구해. 그 다음엔… 다음 일은 다음에 생각하자고.

1000616886.english: Is this cocoa? It looks a little different than I imagined. You're making chocolate with this?
1000616886.korean: 이게 카카오? 상상했던 모양과는 좀 다른데? 이걸로 초콜릿을 만든다고?

1000616887.english: Single… Estate… Limas… What does it say?
1000616887.korean: 싱글… 에스테이트… 리마스… 뭐라고 쓰여 있어.

1000616888.english: That's a trademark. Just wait a moment. I have some information sent by our cat...
1000616888.korean: 그건 상표야. 잠시 기다려 봐. 우리 고양이가 보내준 자료가 있으니까…

1000616889.english: Yeah... That's right. I think this is Kakao? You!!! You!!! What are you doing? Why are you eating that?!
1000616889.korean: 으응… 맞아. 이게 카카오가 맞는 것 같은데? 너!!! 너!!! 뭐하는 거야? 그걸 왜 먹어?!

1000616891.english: Bitter? No way! Chocolate is sweet…
1000616891.korean: 쓰다고? 그럴 리가! 초콜릿은 달콤한 건데…

1000616892.english: … That vile pest cat tricked you! To make my master hate me! You vile pest!
1000616892.korean: … 그 못된 해충 고양이가 널 속였어! 주인님에게 날 미움받게 하려고! 나쁜 해충년!

1000616893.english: What? Don't be ridiculous. Why is my cat fooling me? Are you trying to stir up trouble right now?
1000616893.korean: 뭐? 웃기지마. 우리 고양이가 날 왜 속여? 설마 지금 이간질하는 거야?

1000616894.english: If I make the perfect chocolate, the master will only look at me… Pest… I won't forgive you!
1000616894.korean: 내가 완벽한 초콜릿을 만들면 주인님이 나만 바라볼 테니… 해충… 용서 못해!

1000616895.english: Don't talk nonsense. You're the ones lying, right? My siblings don't do that. This time...
1000616895.korean: 말도 안 되는 소리 하지마. 속이는 건 너희 자매들이겠지. 내 동생들은 그런 짓 안해. 이번 일은…

1000616896.english: My sisters are deceiving me? … These pests…
1000616896.korean: 내 자매들이 날 속인다고? … 이 해충이…

1000616897.english: Heh… You and your sister had a good time with the master, except for you, the stalker… Don't you know?
1000616897.korean: 훗… 너희 언니랑 동생은 스토커 너만 빼고 주인님과 좋은 시간을 보냈는데… 몰라?

1000616898.english: Even your old sister flirted with herself, shaking her breasts in a shameful way? Your sister, who pretends to be well-behaved, must have been secretly acting like a cheapskate, too. Maybe that little girl... Oh, maybe not?
1000616898.korean: 그 늙은 너희 언니도 추접스럽게 가슴을 흔들면서 아양을 떨어댔는데? 얌전한 척 하는 네 동생도 몰래 싸구려처럼 굴었을걸? 어쩌면 그 어린 년도… 아 그건 아니려나?

1000616900.english: Lies? Ask me. You won't be able to answer. I must have lied to you.
1000616900.korean: 거짓말? 물어 봐. 아무런 대답도 못할 걸? 널 속였을 테니.

1000616901.english: You… you pest… You've never been called by your master at night! Why are you acting so smart?
1000616901.korean: 너… 해충… 넌 주인님이 넌 한 번도 밤에 부른 적 없잖아! 왜 그렇게 잘난 척이야?

1000616902.english: Hah. Aren't you stupid? Do you think I'll get mad every time you play with my toys?
1000616902.korean: 훗. 너 바보 아냐? 주인님이 장난감 좀 가지고 노는 걸로 내가 일일이 화낼 것 같아?

1000616903.english: It’s only natural for men to have a few flings. What really matters is who becomes his lifelong partner… his wife.
1000616903.korean: 인간 남자 분들은 노리개 몇 쯤은 원래 가지고 있는 거야. 중요한 건 그 분의 조강지처… 아내가 누가 되느냐지.

1000616904.english: Your pest brothers are all playthings too!

1000616905.english: My younger siblings are not slaves, so they don't act rudely towards their master and just endure it.
1000616905.korean: 내 동생들은 노리개가 아니기 때문에 주인님께 함부로 들이대지 않고 참는 거야.

1000616906.english: If my master realizes my true love, I plan to share some with my younger siblings as well. My younger siblings know who will become my master's wife.
1000616906.korean: 내 진정한 사랑을 주인님께서 깨달으시면 내 동생들에게도… 뭐 조금 나눠줄 생각이니까. 내 동생들은 누가 주인님의 아내가 될 지 알고 있거든.

1000616908.english: Huh? But why is there so much static electricity? Anyway…
1000616908.korean: 응? 그런데 기분 나쁘게 왜 이렇게 정전기가 일어나는 거야? 어쨌든…

1000616909.english: Anyway, what? Pest, you'll have to speak up.
1000616909.korean: 어쨌든 뭐? 해충, 말을 잘 해야 할 거야.
